rationale: Educ. Code §29.169 governs prekindergarten program evaluation and assessment instruments. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote:
A school district shall:
(1) select and implement appropriate methods for evaluating the district's program classes by measuring student progress; and
(2) make data from the results of program evaluations available to parents.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule addresses prekindergarten program evaluation, not property tax exemptions or school funding mechanics affected by homestead exemption changes.
